label: Local File
description: Read and write whitelisted local text or JSON files for graph templates.

inputSchema.label: Path
inputSchema.description: Repository-relative path inside the configured local file allowlist.

inputSchema.label: Content
inputSchema.description: Text or JSON content to write.

inputSchema.label: Default Value
inputSchema.description: Fallback content returned when a read target does not exist.

inputSchema.label: Section Tag
inputSchema.description: Optional XML-style tag used to wrap prompt_section output.

inputSchema.label: Empty Message
inputSchema.description: Prompt body to use when JSON content is an empty object, array, or blank string.

inputSchema.label: Prompt Array Filter
inputSchema.description: Optional exact-match filter applied only to JSON array prompt content, for example {"enabled": true, "deleted": false}.

inputSchema.label: Max Prompt Items
inputSchema.description: Optional positive integer cap applied only to JSON array prompt content.

inputSchema.label: Skip If Unchanged
inputSchema.description: When true, write operations skip file and revision writes if parsed content equals the existing value.

inputSchema.label: Allowed Roots
inputSchema.description: Optional list of safe repo-relative roots. Values must stay under the built-in allowlist.

inputSchema.label: Revision Path
inputSchema.description: Optional JSON file path that receives revision records before writes.

inputSchema.label: Revision Target ID
inputSchema.description: Target identifier stored in revision records.

outputSchema.label: Exists
outputSchema.description: Whether a read target existed before default fallback.

outputSchema.label: Content
outputSchema.description: Text content or serialized JSON content.

outputSchema.label: JSON Content
outputSchema.description: Parsed JSON content for JSON reads and writes.

outputSchema.label: Prompt Section
outputSchema.description: Content optionally wrapped in section_tag for prompt injection.

outputSchema.label: Prompt JSON Content
outputSchema.description: JSON content after prompt-only filtering and item caps. Raw json_content remains unchanged.

outputSchema.label: Write Result
outputSchema.description: Structured file write metadata including changed, skipped, bytes, and optional revision_id.

outputSchema.label: Revision
outputSchema.description: Revision record written before the file update, when configured.

outputSchema.label: Error
outputSchema.description: Error message when status is failed.
